scripts.build: babel wwwroot --out-dir wwwroot-compiled --presets @babel/preset-react --extensions .js --no-babelrc --minified --ignore wwwroot/lib,wwwroot/globals.js && find wwwroot-compiled -name '*.js' -not -path '*/lib/*' | while read f; do npx terser "$f" --compress --mangle --output "$f"; done
